meaning: Wireless Transport Layer,无线寻址信息协议
examples: Figure 6 also describes an example of the mediation approach where the service provider USES a WebSphere DataPower SOA appliance (WDP) to implement a mediation proxy layer.
In this example, routing rules are configured in a WDP web service proxy to route requests from users for two different tenants (a and b) to the respective tenant-specific instance of an application.
Or, if not, the site becomes redundant until WDP buy a new stadium.
